query:
SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, psd.stationCode AS station_code, COUNT(*) AS detail_count, ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 4) AS station_points, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS unique_events
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND psd.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name, psd.stationCode
ORDER BY u.name, psd.stationCode;

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 4) AS total_detail_points, COUNT(*) AS total_details, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS unique_events
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND psd.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name;

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, edp.businessDate, ROUND(edp.totalPoints,4) AS total_points, ROUND(edp.finalKpiScore,4) AS final_kpi_score, ROUND(edp.rawAchievementRate,4) AS raw_achievement_rate, ROUND(edp.avgProcessHours,4) AS avg_process_hours
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND edp.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND edp.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY u.name, edp.businessDate;

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, edp.businessDate, ROUND(edp.totalPoints,4) AS total_points, ROUND(edp.finalKpiScore,4) AS final_kpi_score, ROUND(edp.rawAchievementRate,4) AS raw_achievement_rate, ROUND(edp.avgProcessHours,4) AS avg_process_hours
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND edp.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
